name: RPlog_Don_t_Want_Visitors
title: Don't Want Visitors
summary: Hungover and heartbroken in her darkened quarters aboard the Crusader after a disastrous return from Corellia, Marine Colonel Sabrina just wants to be left alone to drink, but the irrepressible pilot Johanna kicks in her door determined to sober her up and pry out what is wrong. Their confrontation escalates as Johanna probes through the Force and physically hauls Sabrina to her feet, refusing to fetch more wine, until Sabrina, alluding to a painful confession of feelings to Luke Skywalker, threatens to leave the Republic entirely. Princess Leia arrives with a tray of Alderaanian chocolate dessert to soothe the emotions raging through the Force, but Sabrina forcibly shows both women the door and locks herself in. Undeterred, Johanna and Leia track down Luke in his own quarters and demand answers, but the exhausted Jedi Master rebuffs them, insisting Sabrina's troubles are no one else's business. Leia, sensing enough through Luke's grief, accepts this and withdraws, while Johanna, smarting from past lectures about her own indiscretions, grumbles her way out, the cousins' shared heartache left unresolved.
